checks.heading: The Evolving AI Agent Stack: From LLMs to Multi-Agent Systems

observation.spoken_gist: The speaker introduces a background overview, stating that 2023 was the year of LLMs, with ChatGPT launching and many models like GPT-3.5, GPT-4, and GPT-4o emerging. He then mentions that 2024 was focused on Retrieval Augmented Generation.

observation.visual: A man is standing on a stage, speaking into a microphone. Behind him is a large screen displaying a presentation slide. The slide has a dark background with a timeline across the top, showing years 2023, 2024, and 2025, each labeled with a theme. Below the timeline, there are lists of items related to LLMs, GPTs, and an 'Agent Stack'. The bottom right corner of the screen shows the KubeCon + CloudNativeCon Europe 2025 logo.
